programs.name: Crafty Creations
programs.description: Are you ready to create? From making and cutting patterns to choosing colours and decorative elements, you will use a variety of arts and crafts materials, your hands and your imagination, to make unique craft projects.

programs.name: Crafty Creations
programs.description: Are you ready to create? From making and cutting patterns to choosing colours and decorative elements, you will use a variety of arts and crafts materials, your hands and your imagination, to make unique craft projects.

programs.name: Dance: Ballet
programs.description: This classic style of dance is all about graceful movements. Learn basic ballet positions, postures and proper technique through various exercises and engaging choreography. As you continue to practice and develop skills, you will work towards performing a routine at the end of the session.

programs.name: Dance: Breakdance
programs.description: This athletic dance combines elements of hip-hop with acrobatics. Learn basic moves including top rock, down rock, power moves and freezes through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Dance: Hip Hop
programs.description: This classic style of dance is all about graceful movements. Learn basic ballet positions, postures and proper technique through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Dance: Hip Hop
programs.description: Hip    Hop is a street dance that uses strong, fast and fluid movements. Learn basic    steps like body rolls, contractions, bounces and waves through a variety of    exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Drawing
programs.description: Bring your imagination to life on paper. Learn the basics of how to draw using shapes and colours to create pictures with markers, crayons and pencil crayons.

programs.name: Drawing and Painting
programs.description: Explore your creativity through pencils, pastels, acrylic paint and watercolours. Learn about and practice skills including sketching, shading, brush strokes, use of colour and texture.

programs.name: Fashion Sewing: Intermediate
programs.description: Bring your own sewing pattern to make your own garment. By the end of the course, you will also create a sewing sample binder and sewing worksheets to improve your sewing skills. This workshop requires an additional $15 material fee (cash only), payable to instructor for practice materials. Other materials needed: straight fabric pins, fabric scissors, tailor's chalk or tailor's wax, tracing paper, binder, lined paper, and stationary supplies to take notes. In house sewing machines available. Participants must bring their own sewing pattern, fabric, and notions.Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: Gymnastics
programs.description: Flexibility, strength, coordination and balance, gymnastics has it all. With a focus on fun and safety, you will learn and practice basic skills such as walks, jumps, rolls and turns on various apparatuses.

programs.name: Jewellery Making
programs.description: Jewellery enthusiasts will love this activity. Here you will use beads, jewellery findings and wire to make a variety of projects. You will also learn how to use the tools of the trade to design your own masterpieces.
programs.location: Joseph J. Piccininni Cmty Rec Centre

programs.name: Jewellery Making
programs.description: Jewellery enthusiasts will love this activity. Here you will use beads, jewellery findings and wire to make a variety of projects. You will also learn how to use the tools of the trade to design your own masterpieces.
programs.location: Joseph J. Piccininni Cmty Rec Centre

programs.name: Karate - Beginner
programs.description: Learn the fundamentals of competition and perform simple sparring skills while demonstrating exemplary etiquette. Participants in this program should be able to perform fundamental martial art skills and martial-art specific skills.

programs.name: Martial Arts - Beginner
programs.description: This activity introduces you to martial arts.  Here you will develop fundamental martial art skills, simple sparring skills, tactical concepts, show willingness to engage in a variety of sport activities and have confidence to try new skills.

programs.name: Multi-Sport: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports programs are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In multi-sport, you will learn a variety of sports such as basketball, soccer, and volleyball and more, through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Music: Drumming - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the drum with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn grip, stroke, rhythm and hand and foot coordination.

programs.name: Music: Guitar
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to guitar. Here you will learn proper hold, tuning, strumming and chords. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music you will work towards performing simple pieces.Equipment: You must bring your own guitar.
programs.location: Gord and Irene Risk Cmty Rec Centre

programs.name: Music: Guitar
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to guitar. Here you will learn proper hold, tuning, strumming and chords. programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to guitar. Here you will learn proper hold, tuning, strumming and chords. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music, you will work towards performing simple pieces.Equipment: You must bring your own guitar.

programs.name: Music: Keyboard
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to keyboarding. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music you will work towards performing simple pieces.

programs.name: Artist Studio
programs.description: Work on a series of self-directed pieces based on your individual interests in this instructor-led studio course. Create in a supportive environment and develop personal projects in your chosen medium with ongoing guidance and feedback in one-on-one consultation with the instructor. You’ll be encouraged to explore new creative directions and techniques that deepen and expand your practice. Ideal for those seeking structure, inspiration and professional input within a flexible studio setting.

programs.name: Badminton
programs.description: Hit the court for non-stop badminton play. Whether you are a new or experienced player, want to play often or occasionally, drop-in badminton offers something for everyone. Though not formally structured, guidelines are used to ensure participation is balanced. Supervision, use of equipment and capacity limits vary by location, please check ahead.It is free to reserve a spot in this activity, fees may apply at the time of check in. programs.name: Dance: Ballet
programs.description: This classic style of dance is all about graceful movements. Learn basic ballet positions, postures and proper technique through various exercises and engaging choreography. As you continue to practice and develop skills, you will work towards performing a routine at the end of the session.

programs.name: Dance: Breakdance
programs.description: This athletic dance combines elements of hip-hop with acrobatics. Learn basic moves including top rock, down rock, power moves and freezes through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Dance: Hip Hop
programs.description: This classic style of dance is all about graceful movements. Learn basic ballet positions, postures and proper technique through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Dance: Hip Hop
programs.description: Hip    Hop is a street dance that uses strong, fast and fluid movements. Learn basic    steps like body rolls, contractions, bounces and waves through a variety of    exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Drawing
programs.description: Bring your imagination to life on paper. Learn the basics of how to draw using shapes and colours to create pictures with markers, crayons and pencil crayons.

programs.name: Drawing and Painting
programs.description: Explore your creativity through pencils, pastels, acrylic paint and watercolours. Learn about and practice skills including sketching, shading, brush strokes, use of colour and texture.

programs.name: Fashion Sewing: Intermediate
programs.description: Bring your own sewing pattern to make your own garment. By the end of the course, you will also create a sewing sample binder and sewing worksheets to improve your sewing skills. This workshop requires an additional $15 material fee (cash only), payable to instructor for practice materials. Other materials needed: straight fabric pins, fabric scissors, tailor's chalk or tailor's wax, tracing paper, binder, lined paper, and stationary supplies to take notes. In house sewing machines available. Participants must bring their own sewing pattern, fabric, and notions.Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: Gymnastics
programs.description: Flexibility, strength, coordination and balance, gymnastics has it all. With a focus on fun and safety, you will learn and practice basic skills such as walks, jumps, rolls and turns on various apparatuses.

programs.name: Jewellery Making
programs.description: Jewellery enthusiasts will love this activity. Here you will use beads, jewellery findings and wire to make a variety of projects. You will also learn how to use the tools of the trade to design your own masterpieces.
programs.location: Joseph J. Piccininni Cmty Rec Centre

programs.description: Learn the fundamentals of competition and perform simple sparring skills while demonstrating exemplary etiquette. Participants in this program should be able to perform fundamental martial art skills and martial-art specific skills.

programs.name: Martial Arts - Beginner
programs.description: This activity introduces you to martial arts.  Here you will develop fundamental martial art skills, simple sparring skills, tactical concepts, show willingness to engage in a variety of sport activities and have confidence to try new skills.

programs.name: Multi-Sport: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports programs are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. programs.name: Music: Drumming - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the drum with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn grip, stroke, rhythm and hand and foot coordination.

programs.name: Music: Guitar
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to guitar. Here you will learn proper hold, tuning, strumming and chords. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music you will work towards performing simple pieces.Equipment: You must bring your own guitar.

programs.name: A Journey from Acrylics to Oils
programs.description: This introductory–intermediate course is for beginners and experienced painters who want to explore oil painting using water-mixable oils. Often seen as intimidating or toxic, oil painting becomes safe and accessible in this class. Students will learn layering, glazing, and composition while building confidence and personal expression.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: Abstract Acrylic Painting: Composition
programs.description: Express yourself with paint with a focus on abstract composition. Experiment with novel ways of applying acrylic paint on canvas, such as squeegee paint, drip and splatter, flow painting and mixed media collage. Delve into the history of abstract painting, and the elements and principles of composition. Beginners and Intermediate welcome. Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: Artist Studio
programs.description: Work on a series of self-directed pieces based on your individual interests in this instructor-led studio course. Create in a supportive environment and develop personal projects in your chosen medium with ongoing guidance and feedback in one-on-one consultation with the instructor. You’ll be encouraged to explore new creative directions and techniques that deepen and expand your practice. Ideal for those seeking structure, inspiration and professional input within a flexible studio setting.

programs.name: Badminton
programs.description: Hit the court for non-stop badminton play. Whether you are a new or experienced player, want to play often or occasionally, drop-in badminton offers something for everyone. Though not formally structured, guidelines are used to ensure participation is balanced. Supervision, use of equipment and capacity limits vary by location, please check ahead.It is free to reserve a spot in this activity, fees may apply at the time of check in. Please arrive 10 minutes before your scheduled start time to check in with staff and pay. If you do not arrive within 5 minutes of your start time, your spot will be given to someone in the walk-in line. A printed receipt or a mobile screenshot is required at check in.Participants are permitted to bring their own personal equipment.To cancel, visit your online account, speak with community centre staff, or contact Client Services at 416-396-7378 during regular business hours.

programs.name: A Journey from Acrylics to Oils
programs.description: This introductory–intermediate course is for beginners and experienced painters who want to explore oil painting using water-mixable oils. Often seen as intimidating or toxic, oil painting becomes safe and accessible in this class. Students will learn layering, glazing, and composition while building confidence and personal expression.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: Abstract Acrylic Painting: Composition
programs.description: Express yourself with paint with a focus on abstract composition. Experiment with novel ways of applying acrylic paint on canvas, such as squeegee paint, drip and splatter, flow painting and mixed media collage. Delve into the history of abstract painting, and the elements and principles of composition. Beginners and Intermediate welcome. Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: Abstract Acrylic Painting: Composition

programs.name: Crafty Creations
programs.description: Are you ready to create? From making and cutting patterns to choosing colours and decorative elements, you will use a variety of arts and crafts materials, your hands and your imagination, to make unique craft projects.

programs.name: Crafty Creations
programs.description: Are you ready to create? From making and cutting patterns to choosing colours and decorative elements, you will use a variety of arts and crafts materials, your hands and your imagination, to make unique craft projects.

programs.name: Dance: Ballet
programs.description: This classic style of dance is all about graceful movements. Learn basic ballet positions, postures and proper technique through various exercises and engaging choreography. As you continue to practice and develop skills, you will work towards performing a routine at the end of the session.

programs.name: Dance: Breakdance
programs.description: This athletic dance combines elements of hip-hop with acrobatics. Learn basic moves including top rock, down rock, power moves and freezes through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Dance: Hip Hop
programs.description: This classic style of dance is all about graceful movements. Learn basic ballet positions, postures and proper technique through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Dance: Hip Hop
programs.description: Hip    Hop is a street dance that uses strong, fast and fluid movements. Learn basic    steps like body rolls, contractions, bounces and waves through a variety of    exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Drawing
programs.description: Bring your imagination to life on paper. Learn the basics of how to draw using shapes and colours to create pictures with markers, crayons and pencil crayons.

programs.name: Drawing and Painting
programs.description: Explore your creativity through pencils, pastels, acrylic paint and watercolours. Learn about and practice skills including sketching, shading, brush strokes, use of colour and texture.

programs.name: Fashion Sewing: Intermediate
programs.description: Bring your own sewing pattern to make your own garment. By the end of the course, you will also create a sewing sample binder and sewing worksheets to improve your sewing skills. This workshop requires an additional $15 material fee (cash only), payable to instructor for practice materials. Other materials needed: straight fabric pins, fabric scissors, tailor's chalk or tailor's wax, tracing paper, binder, lined paper, and stationary supplies to take notes. In house sewing machines available. Participants must bring their own sewing pattern, fabric, and notions.Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: Gymnastics
programs.description: Flexibility, strength, coordination and balance, gymnastics has it all. With a focus on fun and safety, you will learn and practice basic skills such as walks, jumps, rolls and turns on various apparatuses.

programs.name: Jewellery Making
programs.description: Jewellery enthusiasts will love this activity. Here you will use beads, jewellery findings and wire to make a variety of projects. You will also learn how to use the tools of the trade to design your own masterpieces.
programs.location: Joseph J. Piccininni Cmty Rec Centre

programs.name: Jewellery Making

programs.name: Karate - Beginner
programs.description: Learn the fundamentals of competition and perform simple sparring skills while demonstrating exemplary etiquette. Participants in this program should be able to perform fundamental martial art skills and martial-art specific skills.

programs.name: Martial Arts - Beginner
programs.description: This activity introduces you to martial arts.  Here you will develop fundamental martial art skills, simple sparring skills, tactical concepts, show willingness to engage in a variety of sport activities and have confidence to try new skills.

programs.name: Multi-Sport: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports programs are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In multi-sport, you will learn a variety of sports such as basketball, soccer, and volleyball and more, through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Music: Drumming - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the drum with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn grip, stroke, rhythm and hand and foot coordination.

programs.name: Music: Guitar
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to guitar. Here you will learn proper hold, tuning, strumming and chords. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music you will work towards performing simple pieces.Equipment: You must bring your own guitar.
programs.location: Gord and Irene Risk Cmty Rec Centre

programs.name: Music: Guitar
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to guitar. Here you will learn proper hold, tuning, strumming and chords. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music you will work towards performing simple pieces.Equipment: You should bring your own guitar. We will have a few on site if you require

programs.name: Music: Guitar
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to guitar. Here you will learn proper hold, tuning, strumming and chords. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music, you will work towards performing simple pieces.Equipment: You must bring your own guitar.

programs.name: Music: Keyboard
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to keyboarding. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music you will work towards performing simple pieces.

programs.name: A Journey from Acrylics to Oils
programs.description: This introductory–intermediate course is for beginners and experienced painters who want to explore oil painting using water-mixable oils. Often seen as intimidating or toxic, oil painting becomes safe and accessible in this class. Students will learn layering, glazing, and composition while building confidence and personal expression.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: Abstract Acrylic Painting: Composition
programs.description: Express yourself with paint with a focus on abstract composition. Experiment with novel ways of applying acrylic paint on canvas, such as squeegee paint, drip and splatter, flow painting and mixed media collage. Delve into the history of abstract painting, and the elements and principles of composition. Beginners and Intermediate welcome. Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: Badminton
programs.description: Hit the court for non-stop badminton play. Whether you are a new or experienced player, want to play often or occasionally, drop-in badminton offers something for everyone. Though not formally structured, guidelines are used to ensure participation is balanced. Supervision, use of equipment and capacity limits vary by location, please check ahead.It is free to reserve a spot in this activity, fees may apply at the time of check in. Please arrive 10 minutes before your scheduled start time to check in with staff and pay. If you do not arrive within 5 minutes of your start time, your spot will be given to someone in the walk-in line. A printed receipt or a mobile screenshot is required at check in.Participants are permitted to bring their own personal equipment.To cancel, visit your online account, speak with community centre staff, or contact Client Services at 416-396-7378 during regular business hours.

programs.name: A Journey from Acrylics to Oils
programs.description: This introductory–intermediate course is for beginners and experienced painters who want to explore oil painting using water-mixable oils. Often seen as intimidating or toxic, oil painting becomes safe and accessible in this class. Students will learn layering, glazing, and composition while building confidence and personal expression.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: Abstract Acrylic Painting: Composition
programs.description: Express yourself with paint with a focus on abstract composition. Experiment with novel ways of applying acrylic paint on canvas, such as squeegee paint, drip and splatter, flow painting and mixed media collage. Delve into the history of abstract painting, and the elements and principles of composition. Beginners and Intermediate welcome. Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes

programs.name: A Journey from Acrylics to Oils
programs.description: This introductory–intermediate course is for beginners and experienced painters who want to explore oil painting using water-mixable oils. Often seen as intimidating or toxic, oil painting becomes safe and accessible in this class. Students will learn layering, glazing, and composition while building confidence and personal expression.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: Abstract Acrylic Painting: Composition
programs.description: Express yourself with paint with a focus on abstract composition. Experiment with novel ways of applying acrylic paint on canvas, such as squeegee paint, drip and splatter, flow painting and mixed media collage. Delve into the history of abstract painting, and the elements and principles of composition. Beginners and Intermediate welcome. Materials list will be provided.

programs.description: This classic style of dance is all about graceful movements. Learn basic ballet positions, postures and proper technique through various exercises and engaging choreography. As you continue to practice and develop skills, you will work towards performing a routine at the end of the session.

programs.description: This athletic dance combines elements of hip-hop with acrobatics. Learn basic moves including top rock, down rock, power moves and freezes through various exercises and engaging choreography.

Other materials needed: straight fabric pins, fabric scissors, tailor's chalk or tailor's wax, tracing paper, binder, lined paper, and stationary supplies to take notes. In house sewing machines available. Participants must bring their own sewing pattern, fabric, and notions.Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: Crafty Creations
programs.description: Are you ready to create? From making and cutting patterns to choosing colours and decorative elements, you will use a variety of arts and crafts materials, your hands and your imagination, to make unique craft projects.

programs.name: Crafty Creations
programs.description: Are you ready to create? From making and cutting patterns to choosing colours and decorative elements, you will use a variety of arts and crafts materials, your hands and your imagination, to make unique craft projects.

programs.name: Dance: Ballet
programs.description: This classic style of dance is all about graceful movements. Learn basic ballet positions, postures and proper technique through various exercises and engaging choreography. As you continue to practice and develop skills, you will work towards performing a routine at the end of the session.

programs.name: Dance: Breakdance
programs.description: This athletic dance combines elements of hip-hop with acrobatics. Learn basic moves including top rock, down rock, power moves and freezes through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Dance: Hip Hop
programs.description: This classic style of dance is all about graceful movements. Learn basic ballet positions, postures and proper technique through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Dance: Hip Hop
programs.description: Hip    Hop is a street dance that uses strong, fast and fluid movements. Learn basic    steps like body rolls, contractions, bounces and waves through a variety of    exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Drawing
programs.description: Bring your imagination to life on paper. Learn the basics of how to draw using shapes and colours to create pictures with markers, crayons and pencil crayons.

programs.name: Drawing and Painting
programs.description: Explore your creativity through pencils, pastels, acrylic paint and watercolours. Learn about and practice skills including sketching, shading, brush strokes, use of colour and texture.

programs.name: Fashion Sewing: Intermediate
programs.description: Bring your own sewing pattern to make your own garment. By the end of the course, you will also create a sewing sample binder and sewing worksheets to improve your sewing skills. This workshop requires an additional $15 material fee (cash only), payable to instructor for practice materials. Other materials needed: straight fabric pins, fabric scissors, tailor's chalk or tailor's wax, tracing paper, binder, lined paper, and stationary supplies to take notes. In house sewing machines available. Participants must bring their own sewing pattern, fabric, and notions.Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: Gymnastics
programs.description: Flexibility, strength, coordination and balance, gymnastics has it all. With a focus on fun and safety, you will learn and practice basic skills such as walks, jumps, rolls and turns on various apparatuses.

programs.name: Jewellery Making
programs.description: Jewellery enthusiasts will love this activity. Here you will use beads, jewellery findings and wire to make a variety of projects. You will also learn how to use the tools of the trade to design your own masterpieces.
programs.location: Joseph J. Piccininni Cmty Rec Centre

programs.name: Jewellery Making
programs.description: Jewellery enthusiasts will love this activity. Here you will use beads, jewellery findings and wire to make a variety of projects. You will also learn how to use the tools of the trade to design your own masterpieces.
programs.location: Joseph J. Piccininni Cmty Rec Centre

programs.name: Karate - Beginner
programs.description: Learn the fundamentals of competition and perform simple sparring skills while demonstrating exemplary etiquette. Participants in this program should be able to perform fundamental martial art skills and martial-art specific skills.

programs.name: Martial Arts - Beginner
programs.description: This activity introduces you to martial arts.  Here you will develop fundamental martial art skills, simple sparring skills, tactical concepts, show willingness to engage in a variety of sport activities and have confidence to try new skills.

programs.name: Multi-Sport: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports programs are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In multi-sport, you will learn a variety of sports such as basketball, soccer, and volleyball and more, through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Music: Drumming - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the drum with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn grip, stroke, rhythm and hand and foot coordination.

programs.name: Music: Guitar
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to guitar. Here you will learn proper hold, tuning, strumming and chords. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music you will work towards performing simple pieces.Equipment: You must bring your own guitar.
programs.location: Gord and Irene Risk Cmty Rec Centre

programs.name: Music: Guitar
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to guitar. Here you will learn proper hold, tuning, strumming and chords. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music you will work towards performing simple pieces.Equipment: You should bring your own guitar. We will have a few on site if you require

programs.name: Music: Guitar
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to guitar. Here you will learn proper hold, tuning, strumming and chords. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music, you will work towards performing simple pieces.Equipment: You must bring your own guitar.

programs.name: Music: Keyboard
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to keyboarding. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music you will work towards performing simple pieces.

programs.name: A Journey from Acrylics to Oils
programs.description: This introductory–intermediate course is for beginners and experienced painters who want to explore oil painting using water-mixable oils. Often seen as intimidating or toxic, oil painting becomes safe and accessible in this class. Students will learn layering, glazing, and composition while building confidence and personal expression.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: Abstract Acrylic Painting: Composition
programs.description: Express yourself with paint with a focus on abstract composition. Experiment with novel ways of applying acrylic paint on canvas, such as squeegee paint, drip and splatter, flow painting and mixed media collage. Delve into the history of abstract painting, and the elements and principles of composition. Beginners and Intermediate welcome. Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: Crafty Creations
programs.description: Are you ready to create? From making and cutting patterns to choosing colours and decorative elements, you will use a variety of arts and crafts materials, your hands and your imagination, to make unique craft projects.

programs.name: Crafty Creations
programs.description: Are you ready to create? From making and cutting patterns to choosing colours and decorative elements, you will use a variety of arts and crafts materials, your hands and your imagination, to make unique craft projects.

programs.name: Dance: Ballet
programs.description: This classic style of dance is all about graceful movements. Learn basic ballet positions, postures and proper technique through various exercises and engaging choreography. As you continue to practice and develop skills, you will work towards performing a routine at the end of the session.

programs.name: Dance: Breakdance
programs.description: This athletic dance combines elements of hip-hop with acrobatics. Learn basic moves including top rock, down rock, power moves and freezes through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Dance: Hip Hop
programs.description: This classic style of dance is all about graceful movements. Learn basic ballet positions, postures and proper technique through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Dance: Hip Hop
programs.description: Hip    Hop is a street dance that uses strong, fast and fluid movements. Learn basic    steps like body rolls, contractions, bounces and waves through a variety of    exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Drawing
programs.description: Bring your imagination to life on paper. Learn the basics of how to draw using shapes and colours to create pictures with markers, crayons and pencil crayons.

programs.name: Drawing and Painting
programs.description: Explore your creativity through pencils, pastels, acrylic paint and watercolours. Learn about and practice skills including sketching, shading, brush strokes, use of colour and texture.

programs.name: Fashion Sewing: Intermediate
programs.description: Bring your own sewing pattern to make your own garment. By the end of the course, you will also create a sewing sample binder and sewing worksheets to improve your sewing skills. This workshop requires an additional $15 material fee (cash only), payable to instructor for practice materials. Other materials needed: straight fabric pins, fabric scissors, tailor's chalk or tailor's wax, tracing paper, binder, lined paper, and stationary supplies to take notes. In house sewing machines available. Participants must bring their own sewing pattern, fabric, and notions.Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: Gymnastics
programs.description: Flexibility, strength, coordination and balance, gymnastics has it all. With a focus on fun and safety, you will learn and practice basic skills such as walks, jumps, rolls and turns on various apparatuses.

programs.name: Jewellery Making
programs.description: Jewellery enthusiasts will love this activity. Here you will use beads, jewellery findings and wire to make a variety of projects. You will also learn how to use the tools of the trade to design your own masterpieces.
programs.location: Joseph J. Piccininni Cmty Rec Centre

programs.name: Jewellery Making
programs.description: Jewellery enthusiasts will love this activity. Here you will use beads, jewellery findings and wire to make a variety of projects. You will also learn how to use the tools of the trade to design your own masterpieces.
programs.location: Joseph J. Piccininni Cmty Rec Centre

programs.name: Karate - Beginner
programs.description: Learn the fundamentals of competition and perform simple sparring skills while demonstrating exemplary etiquette. Participants in this program should be able to perform fundamental martial art skills and martial-art specific skills.

programs.name: Martial Arts - Beginner
programs.description: This activity introduces you to martial arts.  Here you will develop fundamental martial art skills, simple sparring skills, tactical concepts, show willingness to engage in a variety of sport activities and have confidence to try new skills.

programs.name: Multi-Sport: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports programs are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In multi-sport, you will learn a variety of sports such as basketball, soccer, and volleyball and more, through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Music: Drumming - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the drum with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn grip, stroke, rhythm and hand and foot coordination.

programs.name: Music: Guitar
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to guitar. Here you will learn proper hold, tuning, strumming and chords. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music you will work towards performing simple pieces.Equipment: You must bring your own guitar.
programs.location: Gord and Irene Risk Cmty Rec Centre

programs.name: Music: Guitar
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to guitar. Here you will learn proper hold, tuning, strumming and chords. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music you will work towards performing simple pieces.Equipment: You should bring your own guitar. We will have a few on site if you require

programs.name: Music: Guitar
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to guitar. Here you will learn proper hold, tuning, strumming and chords. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music, you will work towards performing simple pieces.Equipment: You must bring your own guitar.

programs.name: Music: Keyboard
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to keyboarding. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music you will work towards performing simple pieces.

programs.name: A Journey from Acrylics to Oils
programs.description: This introductory–intermediate course is for beginners and experienced painters who want to explore oil painting using water-mixable oils. Often seen as intimidating or toxic, oil painting becomes safe and accessible in this class. Students will learn layering, glazing, and composition while building confidence and personal expression.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: Abstract Acrylic Painting: Composition
programs.description: Express yourself with paint with a focus on abstract composition. Experiment with novel ways of applying acrylic paint on canvas, such as squeegee paint, drip and splatter, flow painting and mixed media collage. Delve into the history of abstract painting, and the elements and principles of composition. Beginners and Intermediate welcome. Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: Badminton - Court
programs.description: Hit the court for non-stop badminton play. Whether you are a new or experienced player, want to play often or occasionally, drop-in badminton - court offers something for everyone. Though not formally structured, guidelines are used to ensure participation is balanced. Supervision, use of equipment and capacity limits vary by location, please check ahead. It is free to reserve a court for up to 5 players, fees may apply at the time of check in and are per person. Please arrive 10 minutes before your scheduled start time to check in with staff and pay. If you do not arrive within 5 minutes of your start time, your spot will be given to someone in the walk-in line. A printed receipt or a mobile screenshot is required at check in. Participants are permitted to bring their own personal equipment. To cancel, visit your online account, speak with community centre staff, or contact Client Services at 416-396-7378 during regular business hours.

Whether you are a new or experienced player, want to play often or occasionally, drop-in badminton - court offers something for everyone. Though not formally structured, guidelines are used to ensure participation is balanced. Supervision, use of equipment and capacity limits vary by location, please check ahead. It is free to reserve a court for up to 5 players, fees may apply at the time of check in and are per person. Please arrive 10 minutes before your scheduled start time to check in with staff and pay. If you do not arrive within 5 minutes of your start time, your spot will be given to someone in the walk-in line. A printed receipt or a mobile screenshot is required at check in. Participants are permitted to bring their own personal equipment. To cancel, visit your online account, speak with community centre staff, or contact Client Services at 416-396-7378 during regular business hours.

programs.name: Badminton: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports activities are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In badminton, a racquet sport that focuses on hand-eye coordination and has you using your racquet to rally for points with a ‘birdie’ you will learn basics like grip, serve and swing, as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: A Journey from Acrylics to Oils
programs.description: This introductory–intermediate course is for beginners and experienced painters who want to explore oil painting using water-mixable oils. Often seen as intimidating or toxic, oil painting becomes safe and accessible in this class. Students will learn layering, glazing, and composition while building confidence and personal expression.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: Abstract Acrylic Painting: Composition
programs.description: Express yourself with paint with a focus on abstract composition. Experiment with novel ways of applying acrylic paint on canvas, such as squeegee paint, drip and splatter, flow painting and mixed media collage. Delve into the history of abstract painting, and the elements and principles of composition. Beginners and Intermediate welcome. Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: Crafty Creations
programs.description: Are you ready to create? From making and cutting patterns to choosing colours and decorative elements, you will use a variety of arts and crafts materials, your hands and your imagination, to make unique craft projects.

programs.name: Crafty Creations
programs.description: Are you ready to create? From making and cutting patterns to choosing colours and decorative elements, you will use a variety of arts and crafts materials, your hands and your imagination, to make unique craft projects.

programs.name: Dance: Ballet
programs.description: This classic style of dance is all about graceful movements. Learn basic ballet positions, postures and proper technique through various exercises and engaging choreography. As you continue to practice and develop skills, you will work towards performing a routine at the end of the session.

programs.name: Dance: Breakdance
programs.description: This athletic dance combines elements of hip-hop with acrobatics. Learn basic moves including top rock, down rock, power moves and freezes through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Dance: Hip Hop
programs.description: This classic style of dance is all about graceful movements. Learn basic ballet positions, postures and proper technique through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Dance: Hip Hop
programs.description: Hip    Hop is a street dance that uses strong, fast and fluid movements. Learn basic    steps like body rolls, contractions, bounces and waves through a variety of    exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Drawing
programs.description: Bring your imagination to life on paper. Learn the basics of how to draw using shapes and colours to create pictures with markers, crayons and pencil crayons.

programs.name: Drawing and Painting
programs.description: Explore your creativity through pencils, pastels, acrylic paint and watercolours. Learn about and practice skills including sketching, shading, brush strokes, use of colour and texture.

programs.name: Fashion Sewing: Intermediate
programs.description: Bring your own sewing pattern to make your own garment. By the end of the course, you will also create a sewing sample binder and sewing worksheets to improve your sewing skills. This workshop requires an additional $15 material fee (cash only), payable to instructor for practice materials. Other materials needed: straight fabric pins, fabric scissors, tailor's chalk or tailor's wax, tracing paper, binder, lined paper, and stationary supplies to take notes. In house sewing machines available. Participants must bring their own sewing pattern, fabric, and notions.Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: Gymnastics
programs.description: Flexibility, strength, coordination and balance, gymnastics has it all. With a focus on fun and safety, you will learn and practice basic skills such as walks, jumps, rolls and turns on various apparatuses.

programs.name: Jewellery Making
programs.description: Jewellery enthusiasts will love this activity. Here you will use beads, jewellery findings and wire to make a variety of projects. You will also learn how to use the tools of the trade to design your own masterpieces.
programs.location: Joseph J. Piccininni Cmty Rec Centre

programs.name: Jewellery Making

programs.name: Karate - Beginner
programs.description: Learn the fundamentals of competition and perform simple sparring skills while demonstrating exemplary etiquette. Participants in this program should be able to perform fundamental martial art skills and martial-art specific skills.

programs.name: Martial Arts - Beginner
programs.description: This activity introduces you to martial arts.  Here you will develop fundamental martial art skills, simple sparring skills, tactical concepts, show willingness to engage in a variety of sport activities and have confidence to try new skills.

programs.name: Multi-Sport: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports programs are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In multi-sport, you will learn a variety of sports such as basketball, soccer, and volleyball and more, through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Music: Drumming - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the drum with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn grip, stroke, rhythm and hand and foot coordination.

programs.name: Music: Guitar
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to guitar. Here you will learn proper hold, tuning, strumming and chords. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music you will work towards performing simple pieces.Equipment: You must bring your own guitar.
programs.location: Gord and Irene Risk Cmty Rec Centre

programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to guitar. Here you will learn proper hold, tuning, strumming and chords. programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to guitar. Here you will learn proper hold, tuning, strumming and chords. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music, you will work towards performing simple pieces.Equipment: You must bring your own guitar.

programs.name: Music: Keyboard
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to keyboarding. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music you will work towards performing simple pieces.

programs.name: Badminton - Court
programs.description: Hit the court for non-stop badminton play. Whether you are a new or experienced player, want to play often or occasionally, drop-in badminton - court offers something for everyone. Though not formally structured, guidelines are used to ensure participation is balanced. Supervision, use of equipment and capacity limits vary by location, please check ahead. It is free to reserve a court for up to 5 players, fees may apply at the time of check in and are per person. Please arrive 10 minutes before your scheduled start time to check in with staff and pay. If you do not arrive within 5 minutes of your start time, your spot will be given to someone in the walk-in line. A printed receipt or a mobile screenshot is required at check in. Participants are permitted to bring their own personal equipment. To cancel, visit your online account, speak with community centre staff, or contact Client Services at 416-396-7378 during regular business hours.

programs.name: Badminton: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports activities are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In badminton, a racquet sport that focuses on hand-eye coordination and has you using your racquet to rally for points with a ‘birdie’ you will learn basics like grip, serve and swing, as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Dance: Ballet
programs.description: This classic style of dance is all about graceful movements. Learn basic ballet positions, postures and proper technique through various exercises and engaging choreography. As you continue to practice and develop skills, you will work towards performing a routine at the end of the session.

programs.name: Dance: Breakdance
programs.description: This athletic dance combines elements of hip-hop with acrobatics. Learn basic moves including top rock, down rock, power moves and freezes through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Dance: Hip Hop
programs.description: This classic style of dance is all about graceful movements. Learn basic ballet positions, postures and proper technique through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Dance: Hip Hop
programs.description: Hip    Hop is a street dance that uses strong, fast and fluid movements. Learn basic    steps like body rolls, contractions, bounces and waves through a variety of    exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Drawing
programs.description: Bring your imagination to life on paper. Learn the basics of how to draw using shapes and colours to create pictures with markers, crayons and pencil crayons.

programs.name: Drawing and Painting
programs.description: Explore your creativity through pencils, pastels, acrylic paint and watercolours. Learn about and practice skills including sketching, shading, brush strokes, use of colour and texture.

programs.name: Fashion Sewing: Intermediate
programs.description: Bring your own sewing pattern to make your own garment. By the end of the course, you will also create a sewing sample binder and sewing worksheets to improve your sewing skills. This workshop requires an additional $15 material fee (cash only), payable to instructor for practice materials. Other materials needed: straight fabric pins, fabric scissors, tailor's chalk or tailor's wax, tracing paper, binder, lined paper, and stationary supplies to take notes. In house sewing machines available. Participants must bring their own sewing pattern, fabric, and notions.Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: Gymnastics
programs.description: Flexibility, strength, coordination and balance, gymnastics has it all. With a focus on fun and safety, you will learn and practice basic skills such as walks, jumps, rolls and turns on various apparatuses.

programs.name: Jewellery Making
programs.description: Jewellery enthusiasts will love this activity. Here you will use beads, jewellery findings and wire to make a variety of projects. You will also learn how to use the tools of the trade to design your own masterpieces.
programs.location: Joseph J. Piccininni Cmty Rec Centre

programs.description: Learn the fundamentals of competition and perform simple sparring skills while demonstrating exemplary etiquette. Participants in this program should be able to perform fundamental martial art skills and martial-art specific skills.

programs.name: Martial Arts - Beginner
programs.description: This activity introduces you to martial arts.  Here you will develop fundamental martial art skills, simple sparring skills, tactical concepts, show willingness to engage in a variety of sport activities and have confidence to try new skills.

programs.description: Instructional sports programs are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. programs.name: Music: Drumming - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the drum with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn grip, stroke, rhythm and hand and foot coordination.

programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to guitar. Here you will learn proper hold, tuning, strumming and chords. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music you will work towards performing simple pieces.Equipment: You must bring your own guitar.
programs.location: Gord and Irene Risk Cmty Rec Centre
